text.title: mocking-strategies Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for mocking-strategies as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: MagicMock without spec swallows typos silently
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: autospec validates call signatures against the real class at mock-creation time.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Python looks up names at call time in the namespace of the importing module.
